resumeTexts: Developed scalable backend APIs using NodeJS, Express and MongoDB.
Built responsive web applications with React, Redux, and TypeScript.
Deployed containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS.
Implemented machine learning models with TensorFlow and PyTorch for NLP tasks.
Designed and optimized SQL databases including PostgreSQL and MySQL.
Created mobile applications using React Native for iOS and Android platforms.
Managed CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, GitLab CI, and automated deployments.
Developed microservices architecture using Spring Boot and Java.
Built data pipelines with Apache Spark, Hadoop, and ETL processes.
Implemented RESTful APIs with Flask and FastAPI in Python.
